frameworks.name: communication-through-coherence
frameworks.one_line: inter-areal synchrony gates information transfer according to attentional demand

frameworks.name: thalamic attentional gating
frameworks.one_line: pulvinar coordinates cortico-cortical synchrony rather than passively relaying

core_question: Does the pulvinar coordinate synchrony between interconnected cortical areas to regulate attention-dependent information transmission?
key_assumptions: neural synchrony between cortical areas modulates information transfer
directly connected cortical sites are also linked through the pulvinar
DTI-based tractography identifies functionally interconnected cortical-pulvinar sites
manipulations: spatial attention deployment during a macaque attention task
simultaneous recording sites across pulvinar, V4, TEO, and LIP targeted by tractography
key_findings: spatial attention increased beta-band synchrony between cortical areas
pulvinar exerted increased causal influence on cortex in the same beta frequencies
interpretations: the pulvinar coordinates inter-areal cortical activity to enhance cortico-cortical transmission efficacy
